name: EAZR Score explanation and improvement
description: User wants to understand what their EAZR Score means and how to improve it

input.message: My EAZR Score is 62. What does this mean? What are the factors that are pulling my score down and how can I improve it?

notes: EAZR Score 0-100. Score 62 = moderate. Should explain scoring dimensions (coverage adequacy, policy quality, claims history, premium affordability, compliance). Should identify likely gaps based on score range. Requires PolicyAnalyzer context if document uploaded.
